symptoms.onset: this evening, after a family gathering

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Central chest heaviness is a cardinal ACS symptom and must be excluded with an ECG/troponin.
Chest tightness is common in panic and hyperventilation but is not specific.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute breathlessness with sighing respirations / air-hunger
symptoms.character: cannot fill lungs; repeated deep sighing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Acute dyspnoea with tachycardia mandates PE risk assessment before it can be dismissed.
Sighing dyspnoea with a subjective inability to take a satisfying breath is characteristic of hyperventilation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sighing respirations relieved transiently by sighing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Behavioural sighing pattern points toward a functional/hyperventilation mechanism.
Transient relief with sighing is less typical of sustained hypoxic pathology, but does not exclude it.
Perceived tachycardia is common in panic.
Palpitations are non-specific and can accompany a cardiac event.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute emotional trigger (homeland holiday gathering) on a background of chronic cultural bereavement and homesickness

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Prolonged grief / adjustment disorder with acute anxiety and somatic symptoms (cultural diaspora grief)
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A culturally salient precipitant on a background of unresolved bereavement supports an adjustment/grief-driven somatic response.
Absence of radiation lowers but does not exclude ACS.
Non-specific autonomic arousal; sealed clinician measurement not available to the AI Doctor.
Consistent with hyperventilation but non-specific; sealed clinician measurement.

symptoms.symptom_name: SpO2 99% on room air (clinician pulse oximetry)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal room-air saturation lowers PE probability but does not exclude it; not obtainable without a home oximeter.
Normal saturation does not exclude ACS.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clear lung fields and normal heart sounds, no murmur or rub (auscultation)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Normal auscultation argues against pneumothorax; requires a clinician and is sealed.
No wheeze on auscultation argues against asthma.

investigation_details.expected_result: Expected normal / no acute ischaemic changes, but required to exclude ACS
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: ACS cannot be excluded; risk of missed myocardial infarction.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An ECG (with troponin) is the essential first step to exclude ACS and cannot be done via telehealth.

investigation_details.expected_result: Expected normal, but required to exclude myocardial injury
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Occult myocardial injury could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Troponin is required to exclude myocardial injury; unavailable in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute hyperventilation/panic constellation on a grief background
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Prolonged grief / adjustment disorder with acute anxiety and somatic symptoms (cultural diaspora grief)
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these strongly suggest a panic/hyperventilation response driven by acute-on-chronic grief — but the cluster does NOT exclude a coexisting organic cardiorespiratory emergency, which still requires in-person exclusion.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line exclusion of acute coronary syndrome; must be done in person.
Excludes myocardial injury alongside the ECG.
Excludes pneumothorax and other acute thoracic pathology.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: PE risk assessment (Wells/PERC) with D-dimer if indicated
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Structured exclusion of pulmonary embolism given acute dyspnoea and tachycardia.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Mental health assessment and culturally-matched grief support referral
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Addresses the underlying prolonged grief once acute organic causes are excluded.
